sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: MAIN SEC Filings - Main Str Cap Corp 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive overview of Main Street Capital Corporation's SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K forms, alongside insider trading reports. It highlights how these documents provide insights into the company's financial results, capital structure, and significant corporate events. The platform also offers AI-powered tools to summarize filings and extract key information for investors.

feed.title: Mister Car Wash Inc stock: What you should know before buying now
feed.summary: Mister Car Wash Inc. operates a large chain of automated car washes in the US, known for its subscription model that drives steady revenue. The company is positioned for growth in the fragmented car wash industry and is considered a resilient investment against economic fluctuations, appealing to investors looking for diversification and long-term stability. Analysts generally view the stock as a hold or accumulate, noting its strong market position and growth potential through acquisitions and membership retention.

feed.title: MacroGenics resumes enrollment in lorigerlimab cancer study By Investing.com
feed.summary: MacroGenics Inc. announced that the U.S. FDA has lifted a partial clinical hold on its Phase 2 LINNET study for lorigerlimab in gynecologic cancers, allowing for the enrollment of new participants under a revised protocol. This decision has been met with investor optimism, reflected in the stock's recent surge. The company anticipates providing a mid-year clinical update on the program.

feed.title: Luxfer declares 13 cent quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Luxfer Holdings PLC (NYSE: LXFR) has declared a quarterly dividend of 13 cents per ordinary share, offering an attractive 4.3% annual yield. The dividend is payable on May 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 17, 2026. This announcement follows a recent Q4 2025 earnings report where the company beat EPS expectations but missed revenue forecasts.

feed.title: LAKE: DA Davidson Lowers Target Price to $10, Maintains Neutral Rating | LAKE Stock News
feed.summary: DA Davidson analyst Michael Shlisky has lowered the target price for Lakeland Industries (LAKE) from $14.00 to $10.00 but maintained a Neutral rating. This adjustment reflects a 28.57% decrease in the target price. Despite the reduction, the average target price from four analysts is $15.75, suggesting a 71.94% upside from the current price, with a consensus "Outperform" rating.

feed.title: Comstock Inc. (LODE) director granted 7,993 shares as quarterly board compensation
feed.summary: Comstock Inc. director Leo M. Drozdoff was granted 7,993 shares of Common Stock as quarterly board compensation for his services from April 1 to June 30, 2026. This award, valued at $0.00 per share, was issued under the company's 2020 and 2022 Equity Incentive Plans. Following the transaction, Drozdoff directly holds 186,474 shares of Comstock Inc. Common Stock.

feed.title: Mach Natural Resources sells 9.0M common units in underwritten offering
feed.summary: Mach Natural Resources announced that Selling Unitholders sold 9,000,000 common units in an underwritten offering that closed on April 8, 2026. The company will not receive any proceeds from this sale, though Tom L. Ward and affiliated entities purchased 153,256 common units. The underwriter also has a 30-day option to buy up to 1,350,000 additional units from the Selling Unitholders.

feed.title: FDA Lifts Partial Clinical Hold on MacroGenics' LINNET Study; Enrollment to Resume
feed.summary: The FDA has removed the partial clinical hold on MacroGenics' Phase 2 LINNET study of lorigerlimab, allowing patient enrollment to continue. This decision follows a revised protocol incorporating additional risk-mitigation measures for potential hematologic and cardiac toxicities. MacroGenics expects to provide a clinical update on the program in mid-2026.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Cuts Clorox (CLX) Price Target, Sees Inflation Pressuring Margins
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for Clorox (CLX) to $110 from $125, maintaining an Equal Weight rating, citing inflation as a significant factor pressuring margins through 2026 and 2027. UBS also reduced its price target to $110 from $121, expressing concerns about future earnings in the consumer staples group due to persistent inflation. The article notes that Clorox, known for brands like Brita and Pine-Sol, is included among the 15 Blue Chip Stocks with Highest Dividends.

feed.title: BNP Paribas Downgrades AT&T (T) to Neutral as Scotiabank Raises Price Target Ahead of Q1
feed.summary: BNP Paribas downgraded AT&T (T) to Neutral from Outperform with a $28 price target. This downgrade comes despite Scotiabank raising its price target on AT&T to $31.50 from $31, maintaining a Sector Perform rating, citing an improved profitability outlook ahead of Q1 results. The article also highlights a revised agreement between AT&T and the U.S. government for the FirstNet emergency communications network, where AT&T will invest more in upgrades and reduce service fees in exchange for faster regulatory approvals.

feed.title: Undercovered Dozen: CVR Energy, Greystone Housing, Conagra Brands, And More
feed.summary: This article introduces the "Undercovered Dozen," a weekly series from Seeking Alpha that highlights 12 lesser-covered stocks. The selection criterion includes companies with a market cap over $100 million, more than 800 symbol page views in the last 90 days, and fewer than two articles published in the past 30 days. The goal is to provide fresh investment ideas and encourage community discussion on these unique opportunities.

feed.title: Coca-Cola’s New Campaign Challenges Japan to Separate the Fizz From the Sizz
feed.summary: Coca-Cola has launched "Fizz or Sizz" in Japan, a campaign inviting people to distinguish between the sound of Coca-Cola fizzing and karaage sizzling. The interactive campaign, running across various media, offers participants the chance to win a free Coke for correct guesses. It aims to connect the refreshment of Coca-Cola with the enjoyment of food through an engaging sound-based game.

feed.title: [Form 4/A] ESTABLISHMENT LABS HOLDINGS INC. Amended Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: ESTABLISHMENT LABS HOLDINGS INC. CEO Filippo Caldini reported amended insider trading activity, including equity compensation awards. He received stock options for 24,879 common shares at an exercise price of $76.23 and a grant of 14,266 common shares. These awards have a vesting schedule over several years, and following these transactions, Caldini directly holds 49,511 common shares.

feed.title: Kohl's Corp stock: Why loyalty drives value in retail challenges
feed.summary: Kohl's Corp leverages its extensive Kohl's Rewards program, with over 30 million members, to drive repeat business and maintain stability amidst a challenging retail landscape. The company's blend of physical stores, e-commerce, and strategic partnerships like Sephora helps it appeal to value-conscious shoppers. For investors, Kohl's presents a defensive play with potential undervaluation, making it a noteworthy consideration for long-term, patient portfolios.

feed.title: Kiniksa (NASDAQ: KNSA) CFO exercises 2,694 RSUs, covers tax with shares
feed.summary: Kiniksa Pharmaceuticals International, plc CFO Mark Ragosa exercised 2,694 Restricted Share Units (RSUs) on April 7, 2026, which converted into Class A Ordinary Shares. To cover tax obligations related to this vesting, 1,303 shares were withheld at $48.94 per share. Following these transactions, Ragosa directly holds 16,154 Class A Ordinary Shares, with no open-market sales occurring.

feed.title: Kiniksa (KNSA) COO executes RSU exercise and 2,367-share sale under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Kiniksa Pharmaceuticals International, plc's COO, Ross Moat, engaged in several equity transactions, including exercising 2,477 Restricted Share Units and selling 774 shares to cover tax obligations. Additionally, he sold 2,367 Class A Ordinary Shares in an open-market transaction under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Following these transactions, Moat directly holds 12,029 Class A Ordinary Shares.

feed.title: Coca Cola Femsa S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE:KOF) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $1.09
feed.summary: Coca Cola Femsa (NYSE:KOF) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.0873 per share, payable on May 1st to shareholders of record on April 20th. This represents a 9.0% increase from the previous dividend and an annual yield of approximately 4.2%. The dividend is considered sustainable, with a payout ratio of 49.9% and analysts forecasting sufficient future earnings to cover it.

feed.title: KRC Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: This article analyzes Kilroy Realty Corp (KRC)'s financial performance, focusing on its revenue breakdown, profitability margins, and competitive positioning. KRC's primary revenue driver is Office Properties, contributing 93.8% of its sales, and it maintains a gross margin of 31.35%. The company's financials are compared against competitors like FRMI and BNL, highlighting its market capitalization and efficiency metrics within the Commercial REITs industry.

feed.title: Kratos Rises, Lockheed Falls. Defense Stocks Mixed After Iran Cease-Fire.
feed.summary: Defense stocks showed mixed performance on Wednesday following President Donald Trump's agreement to a cease-fire with Iran. Investors focused on the implications for future spending priorities rather than immediate short-term spending decisions related to a potential conflict. Kratos Defense & Security Solutions saw its stock rise, while Lockheed Martin experienced a decline.

feed.title: Jet.AI announces $5M economic interest in SpaceX, subsidiaries
feed.summary: Jet.AI (JTAI) has announced a $5 million strategic investment to gain economic interest in SpaceX and its subsidiaries, including x.AI/Grok, Starlink, and X/Twitter. This investment was made through a special purpose vehicle that held equity in xAI prior to its acquisition by SpaceX. The move reinforces Jet.AI’s pivot towards AI infrastructure and aims to provide exposure to the potential performance and growth of SpaceX and xAI.

feed.title: The Cooper Companies, Inc. Files Form 8-K with SEC: Company Details, Stock Information, and Voting Results
feed.summary: The Cooper Companies, Inc. (NASDAQ: COO) held its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, where key proposals including the re-election of directors, ratification of KPMG LLP as the independent auditor, and an advisory vote on executive compensation were approved with strong support. The outcomes signal stability and continuity in leadership and strategy, with no unexpected M&A activities or governance issues highlighted in the SEC filing. Investors can interpret these results as an indication of continued shareholder confidence in the company.

feed.title: Homebuilder KB Home leaves Los Angeles for a new Tempe base
feed.summary: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) announced its decision to relocate its corporate headquarters from Los Angeles to Tempe, Arizona, beginning in spring 2027. This strategic move aims to centralize executive leadership and corporate functions, lower the company's cost structure, and enhance operational efficiency within the business-friendly Phoenix metro area. Despite the relocation, KB Home confirmed its commitment to maintaining a significant presence in California with six operating divisions and over 100 communities.

feed.title: KB Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: KB Financial Group Inc (KB) generates significant revenue from Corporate Banking, which accounts for 24.9% of its total sales, alongside other banking and household services. The company demonstrates strong profitability with an operating margin of 31.84% and a net margin of 13.39%. KB, with a market capitalization of $38.36 billion, competes with industry leaders like CIB and BSAC.

feed.title: Jupiter Neurosciences Appoints Kristopher Fishman and Sanjiv Lal to Nugevia™ Advisory Board
feed.summary: Jupiter Neurosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: JUNS) has appointed Kristopher Fishman and Sanjiv Lal to its Nugevia™ Advisory Board. These appointments aim to strengthen Jupiter's entry into the over $1.5 billion nutraceutical market by leveraging the new advisors' expertise in nationwide pharmacy and wellness distribution channels. Nugevia™ is Jupiter's consumer longevity product line, based on its patented JOTROL™ micellar delivery technology, which is also used in its clinical pipeline.

feed.title: RTX Secures $627 Million Contract for Patriot Systems with Nethe
feed.summary: RTX Corporation's division, Raytheon, has secured a $627 million contract with the Netherlands for Patriot air and missile defense systems, highlighting the demand for advanced defense technologies. Despite a strong financial performance marked by revenue growth and solid margins, the company's valuation metrics suggest a premium trading position. Investors are advised to consider the high valuation and insider selling trends, even as technical indicators show a balanced market sentiment and institutional ownership remains high.

feed.title: Columbia Variable Portfolio - Small Company Growth Fund CRL Holdings History

The fund holds 19,087 shares valued at $3.81 million, representing 1.69% of its portfolio. The initial trade was in Q3 2019, with the fund making one purchase and one sale of CRL shares, resulting in an estimated gain of $38,044.28.

feed.title: LGND Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: The article analyzes Ligand Pharmaceuticals Inc (LGND) financials, highlighting its revenue breakdown, profitability margins, and competitive position. Kyprolis is LGND's largest revenue contributor, accounting for 18.5% of total sales. The company demonstrates strong profitability with an 81.42% gross margin and a 75.06% net margin, outperforming competitors like AMRX in efficiency.

feed.title: Has The Recent Slide In Becton Dickinson (BDX) Opened A Long Term Opportunity?
feed.summary: Becton Dickinson (BDX) has experienced recent stock declines but appears undervalued according to Simply Wall St's analysis. Using discounted cash flow and price-to-earnings ratios, the company shows a significant discount to its intrinsic value and trades below its "Fair Ratio." The article suggests that despite recent performance, BDX may offer a long-term opportunity for investors.

feed.title: NetApp Nutanix Alliance Puts Hybrid Cloud And AI Goals In Focus
feed.summary: NetApp and Nutanix have announced a new alliance to integrate NetApp's Intelligent Data Infrastructure with the Nutanix Cloud Platform, targeting hybrid and multi-cloud environments. This partnership aims to simplify operations, improve migration, and enhance cyber resilience while laying the groundwork for deeper integration to support AI-related use cases. For investors, this move solidifies NetApp's position within a broader virtualization and cloud stack, aligning with the industry's shift towards cloud-centric, software-heavy offerings.

feed.title: iShares Core S&P U.S. Growth ETF (IUSG) Stock Price, Quote, News & History

The ETF tracks the S&P 900 Growth Index and invests in large and mid-capitalization growth sectors of the U.S. equity market. The article also addresses common FAQs about purchasing, competitors, forecasts, dividends, and earnings for IUSG.

feed.title: ITUB Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: This article analyzes the financial performance of Itau Unibanco Holding SA (ITUB), focusing on its revenue breakdown, profitability margins, and comparison with competitors. Commercial banking is identified as the primary revenue driver, contributing 69.9% of total sales. The report details key profitability metrics like operating margin (31.13%) and net margin (27.26%), alongside a Return on Equity of 22.43%, and benchmarks ITUB against competitors like BAC and RY.

feed.title: Jefferies Maintains Buy on Macy’s, Inc. (M) March 18, 2026
feed.summary: Jefferies has reiterated its Buy rating on Macy’s, Inc. (M) as of March 18, 2026, citing an encouraging Q1 comparable sales guide. This maintained rating led to a short-term stock price increase of 4.2% ($0.74) and stabilizes investor sentiment without providing a new price target. Meyka AI currently rates Macy's with a 'B' grade, reflecting its performance against benchmarks, financial growth, and analyst consensus.

feed.title: INFQ: 2026 revenue guidance rises to $40 million amid strong demand and major quantum technology milestones
feed.summary: Infleqtion (INFQ) has revised its 2026 revenue guidance upwards to $40 million from an earlier projection of $32.5 million for 2025. This increase is attributed to strong demand, significant advancements in quantum sensing and computing platforms, major partnerships, and expanded funding. The company also reported a non-GAAP operating loss of $28.1 million for 2025.

feed.title: Investar Holding (NASDAQ: ISTR) details 2026 meeting, pay and equity plan votes
feed.summary: Investar Holding Corporation (NASDAQ: ISTR) has released details for its 2026 Annual Shareholder Meeting on May 20, 2026, where shareholders will vote on the election of 13 directors, the ratification of BDO USA, P.C. as independent auditor, advisory resolutions on executive compensation, and the approval of a Second Amended and Restated 2017 Long-Term Incentive Compensation Plan. This updated plan seeks to authorize up to 1,800,000 shares for stock-based awards, addressing the near depletion of the current plan's share reserve. The proxy statement also outlines executive officers' compensation, including base salaries, cash incentives, and long-term equity awards, along with share ownership details for beneficial owners, directors, and executives.

feed.title: CEO control, losses and pay outlined in InterGroup (INTG) 2026 proxy filing
feed.summary: InterGroup Corporation's 2026 proxy filing reveals that CEO John V. Winfield maintains significant control with 68.8% beneficial ownership, while the company reported net losses of $5.35 million in 2025 and $9.80 million in 2024. Winfield's compensation remained stable at $897,000 for both fiscal years amidst declining shareholder returns. The filing also details the upcoming Annual Meeting on May 20, 2026, where shareholders will vote on director elections and the ratification of Whitley Penn LLP as the independent auditor.

feed.title: Canary Capital Files PEPE ETF as Wall Street Tests Institutional Demand for Meme Coins
feed.summary: Canary Capital Group LLC has filed a registration statement with the U.S. SEC for a Canary $PEPE ETF, aimed at providing regulated exposure to the $PEPE token through a traditional brokerage account without direct token custody. The ETF will track the price of $PEPE via direct holdings, highlighting a growing institutional interest in volatile meme-based cryptocurrencies beyond Bitcoin and Ethereum. However, the filing acknowledges risks due to $PEPE's lack of utility, potential market manipulation, and unstable valuation.

feed.title: IHS (IHS) EVP and general counsel exercises RSUs and receives 101,495-share award
feed.summary: IHS Holding Ltd's EVP and Group General Counsel, Mustafa Tharoo, exercised fully vested Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) for 10,224 Ordinary Shares and also received a compensation-related award of 101,495 Ordinary Shares. After these transactions, Tharoo directly holds 778,874 Ordinary Shares. The Form 4 filing indicates these were acquisitions and no shares were sold.

feed.title: Is KeyCorp (KEY) Among the 13 Bank Stocks with Highest Dividends?
feed.summary: KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) is featured in a list of bank stocks with the highest dividends. The article details recent analyst rating changes, with Evercore ISI and Morgan Stanley lowering price targets due to concerns about economic growth, inflation from the Middle East conflict, and private credit market worries. Despite these adjustments, KeyCorp's CFO expects strong revenue growth of about 7% for 2026, driven by net interest income and noninterest income increases, alongside positive operating leverage.

It sources market data from ICE Data Services and reference data from FactSet.

feed.title: Inter & Co’s Banco Inter Raises R$300 Million via Perpetual Subordinated Notes
feed.summary: Inter & Co's subsidiary, Banco Inter S.A., has successfully raised R$300 million through the issuance of perpetual Tier I subordinated financial bills to professional investors in Brazil. This issuance is expected to boost Banco Inter's Basel Ratio by 0.7 percentage points, strengthening its capital position and supporting future balance sheet growth. The stock (INTR) currently holds a Neutral rating according to TipRanks' AI Analyst, driven by improving fundamentals but tempered by increased leverage and weaker technical momentum.

feed.title: Is KeyCorp (KEY) Among the 13 Bank Stocks with Highest Dividends?
feed.summary: KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) is listed among the top 13 bank stocks for dividends, despite recent price target reductions by Evercore ISI and Morgan Stanley due to concerns over the Middle East conflict and market worries. KeyCorp expects revenue to grow by about 7% in 2026, driven by net interest income and noninterest income growth, with expenses rising by 3% to 4%. The article suggests that while KEY has potential, certain AI stocks might offer greater upside and less risk.

(BSP:P2TC34), including information on its stock performance, essential business developments, insider transactions, and financial guidance changes. It highlights corporate actions like the adoption of Codebeamer by BMW, partnerships with NVIDIA, and the completion of divestitures.

feed.title: First Solar (FSLR.SW, SIX) pre-market CHF153.40 up 143.99% 09 Apr 2026: volume spike signals trade interest
feed.summary: First Solar (FSLR.SW) experienced a significant pre-market surge, trading at CHF153.40, up 143.99% with an unusual volume spike, signaling strong trade interest driven by analyst updates and sector news. The company's valuation metrics show a premium against sector peers, and Meyka AI assigns a "BUY" suggestion with a model forecast projecting future price movements. Investors are advised to monitor volume persistence and company updates due to the inherent volatility of pre-market spikes and current market conditions.

feed.title: JPMorgan Lowers Bank of America (BAC) Target; UBS Also Trims Estimates
feed.summary: JPMorgan lowered its price target for Bank of America (BAC) to $57.50 from $61.50, maintaining an Overweight rating, amidst a broader Q1 preview for large-cap banks. UBS also trimmed its price goal for Bank of America to $62 from $67, keeping a Buy rating, noting that despite fewer expected rate cuts, their estimates for 2026 and 2027 remain largely consistent. Both firms expect first-quarter results for large banks to be positive, though JPMorgan anticipates continued market choppiness for bank stocks in the near term.

feed.title: JPMorgan Trims Wells Fargo & Company (WFC) Target, Flags Volatility Risks for Banks
feed.summary: JPMorgan lowered its price target for Wells Fargo & Company (WFC) to $91 from $99.50, maintaining a Neutral rating due to anticipated market volatility and slowing investment banking activity. This revision came as part of a broader Q1 preview for large-cap banks, despite expected "good" Q1 results supported by strong market revenue. The article also highlights Wells Fargo's increased activity in the repo market post-asset cap removal, which has added liquidity and stability to the financial system.

feed.title: How The WEC Energy Group (WEC) Story Is Evolving With Data Centers And Capex Risk
feed.summary: The article does not contain substantive content regarding WEC Energy Group. It primarily discusses Yahoo's privacy practices, cookie usage, data collection for analytics and personalized advertising, and options for users to manage their privacy settings. It appears to be a privacy consent page rather than a financial article about WEC.

feed.title: ImmunityBio, Inc. (IBRX) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz announced that investors who suffered losses related to ImmunityBio, Inc. (IBRX) have the opportunity to lead a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that between January 19, 2026, and March 24, 2026, ImmunityBio chairman and CEO Patrick Soon-Shiong materially overstated the capabilities of Anktiva. Shareholders who lost money are encouraged to contact the law firm before the May 26, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline.

feed.title: InterDigital Signs Patent Licensing Agreements With Buffalo, TV Maker
feed.summary: InterDigital Inc. (Nasdaq: IDCC) has announced new patent licensing agreements with Buffalo Americas Inc. and a global television manufacturer. The agreement with Buffalo Americas covers Wi-Fi 5 and Wi-Fi 6 technologies, while the TV manufacturer agreements relate to high-efficiency video coding and a joint licensing program with Sony. These deals highlight InterDigital's broad innovation in wireless, video, and AI technologies.
